body_transformation: The rounded head with pointed ears now features smooth, elongated cranium with subtle cranial ridges, while the short stubby legs transform into slender, elongated limbs with a soft silver glow along their joints. The beige shell with brown accents becomes a smooth, translucent violet mist shell with faint, glowing neural pathways visible beneath its surface. The light blue body coloration shifts to a soft lavender hue with lilac shimmer, and the pale blue underbelly adopts a pale white glow that extends to the curled tail tip.
signature_feature: Shell: translucent violet mist with faint glowing neural pathways visible beneath.
